---
title: "Machine Learning"
subtitle: "AI workflows, models, and evaluation"
---

This section highlights projects where I build or evaluate intelligent systems — from prompt analysis pipelines to structured decision workflows.

## Projects (newest first)

| Date | Project | Stack |
|------|---------|--------|
| Feb 2026 | [PromptTrace](Machine_Learning/project1.qmd) | Python, AWS S3, CloudWatch, Copilot, MCP |

More machine learning write-ups will be added here as I complete personal and society projects.
